query:
SELECT 
  ar.id, 
  ar.actionId, 
  a.nome as actionNome, 
  ar.solicitanteId, 
  u.name as solicitanteNome, 
  ar.tipoSolicitante, 
  ar.justificativa, 
  ar.camposAjustar, 
  ar.status, 
  ar.createdAt
FROM adjustment_requests ar
INNER JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id
INNER JOIN users u ON ar.solicitanteId = u.id
WHERE ar.status = 'pendente'
ORDER BY ar.createdAt DESC;

INNER JOIN users u ON ar.solicitanteId = u.id
